# services.baikal

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.baikal`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.baikal.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable baikal. |
| `services.baikal.group` | `string` | Group account under which the web-application run. |
| `services.baikal.package` | `package` | The baikal package to use. |
| `services.baikal.phpPackage` | `package` | The php package to use. |
| `services.baikal.pool` | `string` | Name of existing phpfpm pool that is used to run web-application. If not specified a pool will be created automatically with default values. |
| `services.baikal.user` | `string` | User account under which the web-application run. |
| `services.baikal.virtualHost` | `null or string` | Name of the nginx virtualhost to use and setup. If null, do not setup any virtualhost. |
